items.title: Kane slaat weer toe, oude bekenden uit de Eredivisie trefzeker
items.summary: Bayern München heeft zaterdagmiddag dankzij een betrekkelijk eenvoudige thuiszege op Eintracht Frankfurt de koppositie in de Bundesliga verstevigd. Harry Kane was weer eens op dreef bij Der Rekordmeister , die in de slotfase Frankfurt nog hoop bood op een succesje. Nummer drie 1899 Hoffenheim morste punten bij FC Köln, bij wie voormalig Sparta Rotterdam-spits Ragnar Ache op prachtige wijze scoorde. Bij Wolfsburg scoorde voormalig NEC'er Kento Shiogai voor het eerst, maar zijn goal leverde niets op tegen FC Augsburg.

items.title: Flemming dompelt Chelsea in rouw met kopbal in blessuretijd
items.summary: Zian Flemming heeft Burnley zaterdag een punt bezorgd op bezoek bij Chelsea. De Nederlandse spits kopte in de blessuretijd de 1-1 binnen op Stamford Bridge. The Blues deden vooral zichzelf de das om, na de zoveelste rode kaart van het seizoen. Ondertussen verspeelde ook concurrent Aston Villa dure punten.

items.title: Tammy Abraham rescues late point for Aston Villa to deny Leeds
items.summary: It felt like the day Aston Villa’s faint title hopes were extinguished despite Tammy Abraham’s late equaliser. Anton Stach’s incredible free-kick looked set to secure the win for Leeds until the 88th minute but it felt like another important point in their fight for survival. Unai Emery’s side have only won once in their past four Premier League home games and fell short once more to leave them seven points behind leaders Arsenal. They were punished for a sloppy opening 45 minutes when they failed to get almost anything right against their more aggressive opponents. Continue reading...

items.title: Flemming rescues last-gasp point for Burnley after Chelsea’s Fofana sees red
items.summary: Chelsea got what they deserved here. Coasting to fourth courtesy of an early João Pedro goal the second-half dismissal of Wesley Fofana gave a glimmer to a Burnley team previously clinging on. Liam Rosenior’s team desperately tried to run down the clock, only to allow an unmarked Zian Flemming to nod home a James Ward-Prowse corner in added time. It might have been worse, Jacob Bruun Larsen nodded an identical Ward-Prowse corner over the bar. Rust the culprit? Chelsea’s players had enjoyed four days off given to them by Rosenior, Cole Palmer heading a winter sun delegation to Dubai in a rare midweek without competitive action. Estêvão was an absentee after a hamstring issue picked up on his return to training. Roméo Lavia, missing since November, on the bench was a point of intrigue, after the news he had spent his convalescence fine-tuning his decision making with the help of virtual reality. Continue reading...

items.title: West Ham v Bournemouth: Premier League – live
items.summary: ⚽ Updates from the 5.30pm (GMT) kick-off ⚽ Live scores | Follow us on Bluesky | And email Taha West Ham make one change from the side that drew against Manchester United: Freddie Potts is suspended after receiving a red card against Burton Albion in the FA Cup, so in comes Soungoutou Magassa. Eli Junior Kroupi and Tyler Adams are back in for Bournemouth. West Ham: Hermansen, Wan-Bissaka, Mavropanos, Disasi, Diouf, Fernandes, Magassa, Bowen, Soucek, Summerville, Castellanos Continue reading...

items.title: Sources: Prestianni told UEFA he used anti-gay slur
items.summary: Gianluca Prestianni has already given evidence in UEFA's investigation into his alleged racist abuse of Vinícius Júnior, sources told ESPN.

items.title: Wrexham come back to win chaotic 8-goal thriller
items.summary: Wrexham boosted their promotion hopes with a 5-3 victory over fellow high-fliers Ipswich in a crazy game at the Stok Cae Ras.

items.title: 654 and counting: Milner becomes PL record holder
items.summary: James Milner has broken the record for the most appearances in Premier League history.

items.title: Infantino to face no IOC action over Trump event
items.summary: The International Olympic Committee will take no action against its member Gianni Infantino for a possible breach of political neutrality rules over aligning FIFA with U.S. President Donald Trump's Board of Peace.

items.title: VI Live: Kovár keert terug onder PSV-lat, twee wijzigingen bij Heerenveen
items.summary: PSV krijgt zaterdagavond bezoek van SC Heerenveen. De koploper van de Eredivisie heeft wat recht te zetten na de nederlaag van vorige week tegen FC Volendam. Het Eredivisie-duel start om 18.45 uur en volg je in deze VI Live.

items.title: James Milner breaks appearance record to help Brighton win at Brentford
items.summary: Brighton marked James Milner’s record-breaking 654th Premier League appearance with a much-needed win at Brentford. The pressure had mounted on the Brighton manager Fabian Hürzeler after a run of one league win in 13 and he turned to veteran midfielder Milner in attempt to arrest a worrying run of results. Continue reading...

items.title: European football: Kane edges Bayern past Frankfurt, Como stun Juventus
items.summary: Bundesliga leaders go nine clear at top with 3-2 win Fàbregas’s side round off damaging week for Juve Harry Kane scored twice as Bayern Munich beat Eintracht Frankfurt 3-2 in the Bundesliga on Saturday to move nine points clear of Borussia Dortmund at the top of the table. Bayern took the lead in the 16th minute when Aleksandar Pavlovic volleyed in from the edge of the box and Kane made it 2-0 four minutes later, ghosting inside a crowded box to head home from a Michael Olise corner. The England captain struck again in the 68th minute, punishing a defensive error before curling a shot inside the left post for his 28th league goal of the season. Continue reading...

items.title: 'Like landing on the moon': How Milner set a near-unbreakable Premier League record
items.summary: At age 40, James Milner is now the Premier League's all-time appearances leader. Teammates and coaches -- from Ashley Young to Jurgen Klopp -- share what makes him special.

items.title: VI Live: Summerville in de basis, Rijkhoff goud waard voor Almere
items.summary: Zaterdagavond staat er met NAC Breda tegen FC Volendam een ware degradatiekraker op het programma. De duels van PSV en Ajax volgen we in een apart liveblog. Verder staat ons een druk programma in het buitenland te wachten. Mis niets met VI Live.

items.title: De Wijs kent middag met twee gezichten: verdediger loopt vlak na goal blessure op
items.summary: Wat een droommiddag leek te worden, werd uiteindelijk een strijd die Jordy de Wijs al na zestien minuten moest staken. De verdediger komt amper in de plannen van Fortuna Düsseldorf voor, maar stond zaterdagmiddag voor het eerst dit seizoen aan de aftrap. Hij beloonde zijn basisplaats met een doelpunt, maar moest het veld kort daarna geblesseerd verlaten.

items.title: Dream debut in Dubai! Pegula dominates Svitolina to win 10th WTA title
items.summary: Highlights of the Dubai Tennis Championships final between Elina Svitolina and Jessica Pegula.

items.title: Super 8s starts with washout as Pakistan vs New Zealand abandoned
items.summary: The T20 World Cup Super 8s began in frustrating fashion with Pakistan's game against New Zealand in Colombo washed out without a ball bowled.

items.title: Sensational Ireland cut England apart for record win at Twickenham
items.summary: A sensational attacking display by Ireland saw them put England to the sword with a 42-21 win at a stunned Allianz Stadium, Twickenham in the third round of the Six Nations.
